fields.label: Rule Name
fields.description: Unique name for this conflict resolution rule

fields.label: Rule Code
fields.description: URL-safe identifier for the rule (auto-generated from name if not provided)

fields.label: Is Active
fields.description: Whether this rule is currently active

fields.label: Priority
fields.description: Higher priority rules are evaluated first (higher = more important)

fields.label: DocType
fields.description: Apply this rule to a specific DocType (leave empty for all DocTypes)

fields.label: Field Name
fields.description: Apply this rule to a specific field (leave empty for all fields)

fields.label: Sync Direction
fields.options:
PIM to ERP
ERP to PIM
Bidirectional
fields.description: Apply rule only for specific sync direction (leave empty for all directions)

fields.label: Priority Source
fields.description: Which source takes priority when conflicts occur

fields.label: Resolution Strategy
fields.options:
Overwrite
Merge
Skip
Queue for Review
fields.description: How to apply the resolution when priority source wins

fields.label: Notify on Conflict
fields.description: Send notification when this rule is triggered

fields.label: Notification Recipients
fields.description: Comma-separated list of email addresses or user IDs

fields.label: Condition Type
fields.options:
Always
Field Value
Time Based
Custom
fields.description: When should this rule be applied

fields.label: Condition Field
fields.description: Field to check for condition

fields.label: Condition Operator
fields.options:
=
!=
>
<
>=
<=
contains
not contains
is set
is not set
fields.description: Comparison operator

fields.label: Condition Value
fields.description: Value to compare against

fields.label: Time Window (Hours)
fields.description: Apply Latest strategy within this time window (in hours)

fields.label: Custom Condition
fields.description: Python expression that returns True/False. Available vars: doc, conflict_data, pim_value, erp_value

fields.label: Times Triggered
fields.description: Number of times this rule has been triggered

fields.label: Last Triggered
fields.description: When this rule was last triggered

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Detailed description of what this rule does and when to use it
